architectureNotes: dataType is 'imagelabelling' (VERIFIED in config.js — widget name 'Image Labeling', iconClass 'icon-Image-labelling_number-01'). The QC catalog tentatively listed 'imageLabeling'; the verified config value is used.

Image Labeling is an ELEMENT, NOT an assessment widget. 'imagelabelling' is absent from support/module-setup.ts ASSESSMENT_DATA_TYPES, so resolveDropTarget routes it to the canvas — it drops onto the Instructions-for-Students page (#desktop_view) via cy.dropComponent('Image Labeling'), not into a Generic Step column.

Canvas wrapper is .imageLabelling.component-holder[labelling-template]. Editable fields are contenteditable: #introductionInput (Header), #instructionInput (Instruction), #questionInput (Question), #captionInput (Caption) — set via cy.setContentEditableOn, never cy.type().
Header/Instruction visibility is driven by .displayBlock/.displayNone on .header-text.sc-intro-holder / .instruction-text.sc-instr-holder via settings.isHeaderVisible / isInstructionVisible.
Settings panel body is ng-included into the shared .componentSettingPanel and identified by .img-label-setting.imgLabel; title text 'Image Labeling', icon .icon-Image-labelling_number-01.

Label TYPE radios: #with-Text (Text) / #with-Number (Numbers, default checked) — ng-model currSettings.isNumber. Visibility toggles: #header-visibility, #instr-visibility, #caption-visibility. Show Arrow: #show-arrow-checkbox (text mode) / #show-arrow-checkbox-properties (number mode). Outline radios input[name="outline"] (outline/outlineBg) and .colorPickerInputBox render only when !isGroupActivity. Tags via <tag-manager> in .tagsContainer.

Labels are created at RUNTIME by clicking the uploaded image area (scope.addLabel; scripts/image-labelling-number.js maxCounter = 20). They render via ng-repeat over fieldData.settings.media.labelInfo as .number-Container / .label_text / .Text-Container pins. Default labelInfo[] is empty; label-container presence is automated, but pin creation/drag, the 21st-label boundary, and per-type pin rendering need the OS-picker image + runtime interaction (deferred).

Image upload/replace uses #upload-comp-img (uploadfiles directive) → OS file picker; alt text maxlength = 50. Upload/replace, extension validation, settings-fixed-on-scroll, style 'applied' visuals, Preview/Reader drag-drop, persistence, and accessibility are deferred.
